programme.desc: El chef de Sibaris, Francesco de Sanctis, nos muestra qué hacer con el pavo y el arroz que sobró después de Navidad haciendo canelones de pavo y un aeropuerto navideño.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Francesco de Sanctis nos lleva a Breña para enseñarnos a hacer arroz del norte con las choribrasas de Casa Europa.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: El chef Francesco de Sanctis nos muestra una receta fresca con la delicatessen de Casa Europa haciendo un sándwich triple de crujiente de jamón, aguacate y tomate, y una ensalada fresca.

programme.title: Fuera de carta
programme.desc: Nuestro chef, Francesco de Sanctis, nos lleva a Casa Europa a comprar chorizo huachana para cocinar una fusión de Arequipa, un rocoto relleno de chorizo huacho.

programme.title: ¡Salud por eso!
programme.desc: José del Castillo visita a la chef Fransua Robles en su restaurante La Picante para discutir el legado como un valor importante en la gastronomía.

programme.title: ¡Salud por eso!
programme.desc: José de Castillo visita al chef Jairo Félix en su restaurante El Comedor para conocer su experiencia en gastronomía sobre el valor de la resiliencia.

programme.title: ¡Salud por eso!
programme.desc: José del Castillo visita al chef Tomás Matsufuji de Al Toke Pez para contarnos su historia sobre el valor de la resiliencia en la gastronomía.

programme.title: ¡Salud por eso!
programme.desc: José del Castillo visita al chef César Choy en Maido para conocer su historia sobre el valor del origen y su influencia en la profesión gastronómica.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: En lugar de salir a cenar, el chef Spencer Watts cocina un banquete japonés rápido para cuatro personas en unos 30 minutos, por unos 30 dólares.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Texas real estate agent Sarah Anne Walker was found brutally murdered in a model home. Weeks later, a witness came forward who may have seen the killer. Police used forensic hypnosis to help him recall every detail of the man's appearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators sift through the ashes of a fire which killed a 40-year-old woman. The fire appears to have been started by an unattended cigarette. On closer look, forensic scientists discover the cause was far more complicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Lives changed in the 20 years following an unsolved murder, and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Phantoms
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to America's most haunted city, New Orleans, to investigate the Old U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hotel Haunts Unleashed
programme.desc: On this episode on Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to South Dakota for the first time to investigate the Alex Johnson Hotel, a place filled with history.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mission Point Resort on Mackinac Island. Constructed in the 1950's as a summer destination, it becomes nearly deserted in the winter time, and perfect for the team to investigate.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Residual Haunts
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Prospect, Maine to investigate Fort Knox, built before the Civil War to protect the Penobscot narrows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Pearl Harbor Phantoms
programme.desc: For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!
programme.desc: We pick were we last left off, in Hawaii, for the reveal. Jason and Grant were called back for a very important personal case, the Reid House, in Rhode Island, to help a scared 4 year old.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor
programme.desc: The TAPS team has been called out to investigate Hill View Manor in New Castle, Pennsylvania. Once a nursing facility, this now abandoned building is fraught with paranormal activity that allegedly stems from the violent deaths of former patients.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The TAPS' team is called out to Newport, RI to hold the first ever-paranormal investigation at Seaview Terrace; best recognized from the TV show Dark Shadows.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 2
programme.desc: Two young kids inadvertently unleash a giant sea creature which is strengthened from the abundance of modern-day pollution. Mothra's keepers, the tiny twins Moll and Lora, quickly rouse the gentle giant in order to combat this latest threat to peace.

programme.title: Rebirth of Mothra 3
programme.desc: In the final film in the new 'Mothra' trilogy, King Ghidorah, the most destructive of all the monsters, returns to destroy the Earth. In the end, Mothra is indeed triumphant and takes her place among the greatest of all monsters.

programme.title: Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S.
programme.desc: Mechagodzilla, the superior-armed, state-of-the-art, all-robot version of Godzilla, is undergoing repairs after his devastating battle against the world's monsters.

programme.title: Godzilla, King Of The Monsters!
programme.desc: A 400-foot dinosaur-like beast, awoken from undersea hibernation off the Japanese coast by atomic-bomb testing, attacks Tokyo.

programme.title: Godzilla - The Uncut Japanese Original (Gojira)
programme.desc: American nuclear weapons testing results in the creation of a seemingly unstoppable, dinosaur-like beast.

programme.title: Invasion of Astro-Monster
programme.desc: Aliens from Planet X request the use of Godzilla and Rodan to fight off King Ghidorah but have a better use for the three monsters.

programme.title: Mothra vs. Godzilla
programme.desc: A greedy developer unwittingly hatches a gigantic baby moth upon Tokyo, while Godzilla strikes once again.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen: 15 Chefs Compete
programme.desc: In this episode, the remaining contestants receive a wakeup call from clowns. They must prepare pasta and quesadillas for fifty kids and panini sandwiches for their moms.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay gives the contestants a chicken challenge that includes catching live fowl. The winners spend a day riding in go-karts while the losers prepare chickens for the next service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining chefs get a demonstration in dessert preparation using sound waves and liquid nitrogen, then must steam, poach or boil protein-based dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The contestants prepare Hawaiian dishes for a high school's twentieth reunion. The winners spend the day on a yacht while the losers transform Hell's Kitchen to look Hawaiian.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs prepare five dishes that must include at least one type of beer. The winners attend the Long Beach Grand Prix IndyCar race while the losers unload kegs of beer and bags of ice.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The ten budding chefs prepare comfort foods, with Wolfgang Puck judging them. The winners attend a show at L.A.'s Laugh Factory and take a ride in a convertible, while the losers have to clean the dorms.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Contestants need to be at their sweetest when Chef Ramsay gives them a dessert challenge. The winning team flies to Sin City while the losers prep the kitchen for Hell's Kitchen's "Date Night.”

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The remaining chefs are put to a blind taste test. The winners ride horses in the Hollywood Hills while the losers peel grapes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The seven remaining competitors visit New York City, where they tour BLT Steak. When they return to Hell's Kitchen, their challenge is to prepare ethnic dishes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The teams must prepare three dishes. The catch? One must be made in thirty minutes, one in twenty and the last in only ten minutes.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: For the first time in "Hell's Kitchen" history, chefs from prior seasons return to compete with the remaining competitors.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: In this episode's challenge, each chef must create something special from Alaskan salmon. The winner gets a helicopter ride and lunch at LA's Water Grill. The losers prep fish for the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The final four chefs eat a dish prepared by Chef Ramsay. For their challenge, they must recreate it in 35 minutes. The winner goes to a baseball game while the losers move furniture out of the dorms.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: While wearing new white dinner jackets, the final contestants prepare a menu consisting of four appetizers, four entrees and three desserts.

programme.title: Maya & Miguel
programme.desc: Maya asume que sus vecinos, Greg e Isoka Okri, deben sentirse solos por no tener niños, así que Miguel y ella deciden pasar el fin de semana con ellos.

programme.title: Maya & Miguel

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: Después de que Coop usa un susurro de gato para convertir al Sr. Gato en su nuevo mejor amigo, se hace amigo de todos los animales. Coop y Dennis se unen al equipo de fútbol de la escuela, pero Coop prefiere presumir que trabajar en equipo.

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat

programme.title: Kid vs. Kat
programme.desc: El Sr. Gato ve la oportunidad de matar tres pájaros de un tiro cuando la Sra. Munson viene de niñera con su perro. Coop quiere comprar un casco del capitán Blasteriode, pero la única que lo contratará para el trabajo del jardín es la Sra. Munson.

programme.desc: Cuando Jacobo accidentalmente rompe el disco favorito de su hermano Daniel, desea poder vivir nuevamente ese momento fatídico.

programme.title: The Good Witch's Garden
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Good witch Cassie Nightingale has finally found a home at stately Grey House.

programme.title: A Painted House
programme.desc: 10-year-old Luke had never kept a secret or told a lie. But when two groups of migrant workers-and two dangerous men-come to work the family's Arkansas cotton farm, mysteries suddenly flood Luke's world.

programme.title: A Place for Annie
programme.desc: Sissy Spacek stars as a caring nurse who adopts an HIV positive baby but must fight prejudice and the natural mother who wants custody. Also stars Mary-Louise Parker and Joan Plowright. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Home by Spring
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. An event planner goes undercover as her boss to plan the perfect retreat.

programme.title: I Do, I Do, I Do
programme.desc: An architect (Autumn Reeser) relives her disastrous wedding day over and over until she faces her fears and discovers what she really wants in life.

programme.title: El sabor de verano
programme.desc: Gabby se muda a Bright Shore, donde abre un restaurante y redescubre su pasión. Un día se encuentra con Caleb, un ex jugador de béisbol, que es dueño de su propio restaurante.

programme.title: Por siempre juntos
programme.desc: Durante mucho tiempo, Ellie Hemway a planeando minuciosamente la boda de su hermana. Cuando los huéspedes llegan a una playa paradisíaca, ella se encuentra con su exnovio, Greg, quien también es el padrino.

programme.title: Remodelando este amor
programme.desc: Jules Briggs (Julie Gonzalo) y Lance Waddell (Tyler Hynes) remodelan dos viviendas que conforman un dúplex. Entre tensiones y competitividad, reavivan un viejo romance.

programme.title: Cocina con Amor
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, una aspirante a chef de Portland, intenta ganar una competencia. Sin embargo, un chef rival intenta ganar su corazón. Protagonizada por Natalie Hall y Michael Rady.

programme.title: Festival para solteros
programme.desc: Lindsey viaja a Irlanda para comprar una propiedad perfecta para convertirse en un resort de lujo. Decide entrar al festival de emparejamiento del pueblo para demostrar su inversión en el área y con suerte, ganar un apuesto joven.

programme.title: Un fin de semana de invierno
programme.desc: Cara, una escritora de una revista, está pasando por un rompimiento con su novio en vísperas de Año Nuevo. Con el propósito de distraerse, decide viajar y describir su experiencia para su próximo artículo sin saber que el destino le tiene una sorpresa.

programme.title: Amor de olivo
programme.desc: El premio anual del concurso de aceite de oliva en el Sunset Valley es una parcela de tierra. Cuando Nicole Cabella, una mujer luchadora, se enfrenta a Jake Brandini, un hombre competitivo, jamás esperaron que la chispa naciera entre ellos.

programme.title: Cambio de marca
programme.desc: La ejecutiva de marketing, Josie, regresa a casa al quedar inesperadamente a cargo de sus sobrinos. Mientras está ahí, se encuentra con Cooper, su novio de la secundaria. Protagonizada por Lacey Chabert, Tyler Hynes.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Traveling to another city by bus for a blind date, the girls end up being ditched by two medical students who don't find them attractive - leaving the girls stranded overnight with no way home for over 12 hours.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne attends a Debutante Ball with Lenny when it's found out he's 89th in line to be a duke on the Polish throne.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: The only date - a blind one at that - Shirley finds to make Carmine jealous, is with a former classmate known as Eraserhead (an already balding, chubby, and weird guy). Is it really worth it to get even with Carmine for dating another?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, Edna, Lenny, and Squiggy continue their visit to New York, and Frank wants to win a trip to Italy for his mother by winning the Greased Pole competition.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: TV game show "Be Silly for Dollars" comes to Milwaukee. Len, Squig, and the girls are chosen as contestants. The boys are happy, winning a salami, but the girls perform zany stunts to win the grand prize from "The World of Luxury".

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne's new man Jake is exciting, but that excitement turns to danger when he forces her to help rob a store. Shaken up, she begs Shirley to help rid her of him. Jake won't have it, but can they get him to surrender to the police?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley takes a night school Medical Assistance class. Laverne joins her too. Professor Wilner makes learning tough for Laverne so she walks out, as he says she's unteachable. Will Shirley help Laverne bone up and pass the class?

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: To raise money for the big football game, the boys decide to start their own babysitting service. In Football Frolics, Richie, Potsie and Ralph have their hopes set on seeing the big football game of the year, but tickets can't be found anywhere.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: When Fonzie sets a pigeon coop atop the Cunningham garage and the roof caves, Mr. Cunningham sues to collect damages. In Two Angry Men, Laverne and Shirley prevail upon Fonzie to care for a coop of pigeons.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: After reading too many foreign car manuals, Fonzie is plagued with headaches and is forced to wear glasses for a few weeks, but fears glasses aren't cool.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Malachi brothers sabotage Pinky's car the night before the demolition derby.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: A short-tempered sergeant loses his tenuous grasp on discipline when the Fonz reports to the army recruitment center soon after draftees Richie, Ralph and Potsie check in for physicals.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Personality quirks begin to fray nerves after best friends Richie, Ralph, and Potsie rent an apartment together.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie and Fonzie must think fast to outwit a tough housemother after they're caught past curfew in the college girls' dormitory.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Soon after getting the bad news that the studio deemed his James Dean impression obsolete, and gave Richie's wholesome good looks a contract instead, the Fonz finds a bigger fish to fry.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Richie must choose either a 5-year Hollywood contract or college in Milwaukee while the Fonz accepts the California Kid's challenge to perform a dangerous water ski jump...over a shark!

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Forced to spend the night in the hospital's children's ward, Fonzie worries more about who will be making time with his girl at the Halloween party than the tonsillectomy he's scheduled for the next morning.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, lonely in Mindy's absence, sets the stage for amazing comical confusion when he gets the visiting Orkan Elder to clone multiple Mindys which he continues to do until he gets it right.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy is convinced that she has unleashed the swingingest single ever after she persuades Mork that it would inprove their relationship if each began dating new people and he turns into the hilarious new king of Boulder's social scene.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy eats one of Mork's gourmet delights, she turns into a wacky Orkan herself, sending her family reunion into a rollicking tizzy and treating pompous old Uncle Dave (special guest star Jonathan Winters) to a bizarre evening he won't forget.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: The joyous visit by everyone's favorite, Grandma Cora, turns to gloom when she gets mugged in the park, but Mork turns the dastardly deed into a hilarious caper when he and Grandma join forces to even the score.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork, who doesn't understand why people gossip, reveals some hilarious inside scoops when he shows and tells all about his friends while subbing for Mindy as host of a local TV show called Rumor Has It.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mindy has to work long hours on a new TV call-in show, Mork has to help with the housework. But when his comedic cleaning efforts turn the apartment into a disaster area, he calls up Mindy, on the air, for a new set of instructions.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A bully that works with Lenny and Squiggy is always pushing them around. He gets them to set him up with Laverne, but he has only one thing on his mind. Will the guys step aside or stand up to him and save Laverne?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: After a break-in at Heartland, Tim and Parker form an unlikely duo to find the stolen goods.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Shadow find themselves in jeopardy on a cattle drive. Parker and Katie are left to babysit Lyndy.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim and Jessica's small party snowballs, while Lou struggles to hide a past relationship from the family.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The man who shot Ty returns to Hudson and Amy and the rest of the family grapple with how to react.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Hudson hosts a lumberjack competition and Amy must retrain a Clydesdale to compete in the draft horse race.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy enters Spartan into an endurance race after realizing he's not ready to retire.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy debates what to do when she receives money from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy discovers a horse is being abused at Mallen's farm and convinces her mother to rescue him. On the way home, a raging storm sends their truck careening off the road.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou mistakenly sends Mrs. Roach’s horse, Swallow, home before his fear of traffic is cured. An unknowing Ashley is violently thrown off when the horse is spooked by a truck.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: In order to drum up business for Heartland, Lou is organizing an open house. Amy is totally against it. After all, she’s managed to drum up some high-profile clients on her own.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lisa Stillman sends her nephew Ben to live at Heartland. While Amy and Lou are cleaning out Marion’s old room in preparation for Ben’s arrival, they come across an old letter written by their dad.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Lou decides to make a promotional video to advertise Heartland, nobody is very supportive of the idea. But Lou is determined, perhaps even more than usual.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou's boyfriend, Carl, comes for a visit and his big-city plans clash with the ranch's more laid-back lifestyle. Amy is puzzled by why a new horse at Heartland won't obey commands.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Lou isn’t pleased when a neighboring rancher brings a pregnant mare to stay at Heartland.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los once Chefs restantes cocinan para un bar mitzvah, preparando variaciones gourmet de los tres favoritos del invitado de honor.

programme.desc: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia prepares a three-course dinner, from start to finish, in half an hour. Featuring Vichyssoise a la Russe, Saute of Veal with Mushrooms and Risotto and Pears Baked with Macaroons.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child demonstrates a fabulous way to use leftovers -- crepes! Julia makes a crepe batter in the blender and shows how to cook them, then makes delicious cream fillings out of leftovers, fills and serves them.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child makes her famous French beef stew in red wine with mushrooms and onions, demonstrating how to brown meat, how to braise meat, how to make a good brown sauce, how to braise onions, and how to cut and sauté mushrooms.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: How to make friends with an old enemy: a spinach turnover and a spinach roulade filled with mushrooms. Demonstrated by Julia’s colleague, Simone Beck, in Provence.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child makes Daube and Carbonade de Beouf -- a classic Mediterranean duo. Each stew is easy to make, and each stew offers something new.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child demonstrates how the modest breakfast egg can take you to lunch and dinner in fancy French dress.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Shrimp can be a part of any meal.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Another step in mastering the egg. Showing you exactly how to concoct this marvel of cookery. How to get it together and how to let it wait for the oven until you are ready to bake and serve it - swollen with pride, and justly so.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: The famous Mediterranean sea-bass flamed in fennel - loup flambe au fenouil - how they do it in Cannes, and how you can do a reasonable facsimile at home.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Enjoy dishes that can be completed quickly and easily after work.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: There’s no reason, however small your kitchen, for not braising a large fish in wine and serving it in a stylish mushroom sauce. Here’s a splendid recipe for kitchens of any size, and how to do it in a microwave oven.

programme.title: Julia Child - Cooking with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Jean-Louis Palladin prepares foie gras with poached apples and roasts a duck breast.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child provides an introduction to yeast doughs. Once you’ve seen how easy it is to make these famous desserts, including Babas Au Rhum, you’ll have fun baking them yourself.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Master chef Michel Richard works his magic with puff pastry, making mini-pizzas and then deep-fried parmesan cheese twists.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Julia Child showcases a delicious dessert soufflé that is unconventional from start to fiery finish.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: An especially good recipe for this famous dish of lobster meat sauced and baked in its own shell, or in a reasonable facsimile.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Lynne Rossetto Kasper creates pasta with balsamic vinegar and garlic. Chef Roberto Donna creates homemade pasta with pesto sauce with chestnut flour.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Webster says: “a fancy light yeast dough rich with eggs and butter.” But the proof of the Brioche is in the eating.

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: Make your refrigerator work for you to produce these delicious soft French ice creams. Serve them in coupes, flutes, or cannelated molds - ambrosia to end the meal.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: Start with one large, whole Salmon, and observe as Julia and Jacques transform the fish into Salmon tartar and “Instant Gravlax.”

programme.title: The French Chef
programme.desc: When you prepare asparagus the French way, you have more of it to eat, it cooks faster, stays greener and tastes fresh from the garden.

programme.title: Baking With Julia
programme.desc: Lora Brody, an author, spokesperson, lecturer, and cooking instructor, demonstrates bread machine breads, brie in brioche, and quitza.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs
programme.desc: Reed Hearon prepares frito misto with aioli.

programme.title: In Julia's Kitchen with Master Chefs

programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja try to flee from the rest of the Stone Army that has been brought to life by the Devourer’s toxic venom - and things get a lot worse when Garmadon arrives with a ‘Helmet of Darkness’ and seizes control of the Stone Army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: Laura becomes enamoured by a new student, but he expresses more interest in Mary, which breaks her heart.

programme.title: Classic Albums: Tom Petty and the Heartbreakers' Damn the Torpedoes
programme.desc: This documentary explores the recording process and history behind Tom Petty's classic 1979 rock album "Damn the Torpedoes.

programme.title: Best of Michael Bolton Live

programme.title: The Rolling Stones: Rock Royalty
programme.desc: The Rolling Stones are arguably one of the biggest rock and roll bands of our time, influencing society and music in ways that will never be forgotten.

programme.title: The Story Of: The Kinks
programme.desc: Discover the inside story of the most influential English rock band of the 60’s. Inspired by a mix of genres including rhythm and blues, folk and country, their music created a British Invasion around the world! Their third single "You Really Got Me" b...

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: Glory Days
programme.desc: Bruce Frederick Joseph Springsteen, more fondly known as "The Boss" by his millions of fans, is widely regarded as one of the most influential songwriters of the 20th century and one of the greatest artists of all time. This is his remarkable story.

programme.title: Bruce Springsteen: On the Road
programme.desc: Coming from a poor background in New Jersey, Bruce Springsteen grew to become one of the most recognizable faces in rock music. Having released classic albums such as Born in the U.S.A and Born to Run, Bruce Springsteen's music is legendary.

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Busy Being Born
programme.desc: Few musicians have made an impact throughout the decades as seismic as Bob Dylan. Retrace his journey, from humble folk beginnings in Hibbing, to the bustling electric Greenwich Village.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: The Man in Black
programme.desc: Johnny Cash is one of the most accomplished and influential artists of the 20th century.

programme.title: Johnny Cash: One Song at a Time
programme.desc: Retrace the remarkable story of America’s greatest country artist, one song at a time. Watch and experience the highs and lows of Johnny Cash’s career, the original man in black.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Nina Parker hosts the cast as they discuss the drama-filled season, including Kirk and Rasheeda's status, Stevie and Erica's war of words, and Spice and Tommie's issues.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tensions reach a boiling point between Tommie and Spice, Sierra and Keely talk about their feud, BK Brasco gets a surprise, and Tokyo gets pushed to the limit.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice considers drastic measures to boost her mainstream appeal. An armed robbery propels Stevie J. and new wife Faith Evans back to The A. Scrapp gets his first taste of freedom in nearly three years and comes face-to-face with a shocking revelation

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: The guest list for Karlie's engagement party ignites a wild confrontation. Mimi squares off with Stevie and demands a sit-down with Faith. Scrapp's reunion with his presumed dead father raises questions. Rasheeda agrees to meet Kirk and Jasmine's son

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tokyo's weight loss journey takes a hard left turn. Scrapp finds himself caught between the mother of his child and a new flame. Momma Dee accuses Bambi's mother of plotting a coup. Rising rapper Akbar V. takes steps to provide her son a better life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tiarra complicates Scrapp's new relationship. Joc's secret girlfriend plots their public debut. Karlie goes behind her fiancé's back. Scrappy tries to mediate Momma Dee's battle with Cece.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice makes a bold move that ignites the entire cast. Tokyo struggles with the pressure to lose weight. Jasmine turns the tables on Kirk. Scrappy and Bambi prepare for the birth of their son.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: In the run-up to her engagement party, Karlie's haters plot to expose a long-buried secret. Scrapp gets caught up with his ex. Joc debates coming clean to Kendra. Spice's new look causes an uproar on social media and in real life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie gets surprising news from her fertility doctor and Arkansas Mo. Moniece confronts Scrapp about his viral video scandal. Erica makes a shocking announcement. Tokyo and Shekinah check Che for her bad behavior. Akbar suffers a traumatic injury.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Secrets and lies come to light at Kirk and Rasheeda's couples retreat. Karlie tangles with a surprise visitor. Fresh bombshells rock Sierra and BK's relationship. Back in the A, Moniece's collab with Akbar goes left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tokyo and Akbar clash at their showcase. Karlie goes after Kendra and Bambi as she spirals out of control at the cabin. Erica tries to make peace with Scrappy. Pooh hosts a disastrous cocktail party.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Spice invites Karlie, Joc, and friends to Trinidad. Sierra tries to broker peace between Tokyo and Akbar. Pooh fights to clear her name. Scrapp helps put on a charity benefit. Shekinah handles business for Che.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: The crew arrives in Trinidad. Karlie checks Tokyo and Shekinah. Joc, Kirk, and Scrappy go on a jungle adventure. Pooh airs out Karlie's dirty laundry. Akbar and Scrapp help Che through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Conflict erupts between Joc and Kendra at an all-night rave in Trinidad. Karlie introduces the crew to her family, and Pooh drops scandalous new receipts. Back in The A, Stevie comes face to face with Scrapp for the first time since he went to prison

programme.desc: Masika cozies up to Berg, igniting a fire in Hazel. Ray J tries to move forward after his arrest. Nikki is ambushed with the discovery that Masika is the face of her friend's strip club. Fizz & Amanda remain on the rocks.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/10/21: Kyle Schwarber and Kiké Hernández crush solo home runs early in the game, then Christian Vázquez hits a walk-off two-run home run in the bottom of the 13th inning in Game 3 of the ALDS

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/21: Rafael Devers launches a three-run home run in the 3rd inning, then Kiké Hernández lifts a walk-off sacrifice fly in the 9th inning to take down the Rays and send the Red Sox to the American League Championship Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/2021: The Braves win the 2021 NLDS in four games thanks to Freddie Freeman's first home run of the postseason, a go-ahead shot off Josh Hader in the bottom of the 8th inning.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/14/2021: The Dodgers beat the Giants, 2-1, in Game 5 of the 2021 National League Division Series thanks to an RBI single from Cody Bellinger in the top of the 9th inning and an unlikely save from Max Scherzer.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: A race of evil Moon aliens lands in ancient Greece, wreaking havoc for years on the city of Samar. It’s up to the mighty Hercules to end the chaos.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hercules And The Captive Women
programme.desc: The guys face off against Hercules once again as the strong man fights evil Queen Antinea to get his son back in Hercules and the Captive Women.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A scientist and a reporter discover the lost city of Atlantis, a technologically advanced society.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Time of the Apes
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch a Japanese rip-off of Planet of the Apes, stage their own version of Inherit the Wind, and Crow shows off the latest in ape fashion.

programme.title: MST3K: Time Chasers
programme.desc: A college professor and a reporter go through time in a modified light plane to stop a corporation from using his invention to accidentally create a dystopian future.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: MST3K: Teen-Age Strangler
programme.desc: Mike and the 'bots watch the dreary educational short Is This Love? (1957) and the horrifyingly bad Teenage Strangler (1964).

programme.title: MST3K: Teenage Caveman
programme.desc: In Teenage Cave Man (1958), a rebellious cave boy goes against clan rules and wants to explore horizons beyond the river

programme.title: MST3K: Teenagers From Outer Space
programme.desc: A group of aliens land on Earth and decide to use the planet as a farm for their livestock. One of the aliens rebels and flees to a small town, where he is pursued by another alien who kills anyone in his path.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Untamed Youth
programme.desc: Joel invents a pipe with a smoke detector and a sprinkler system built in for the invention exchange. The guys watch a 1950s teen flick about youths sentenced to manual labor at a cotton farm.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.desc: Police discover the dead body of Andrew Hopper clutching a syringe and covered with blood. The body is in Dr. G’s hands, as are the clues to solving the case.

programme.title: Dr. G: Medical Examiner
programme.desc: Dr. G must determine if a teen boy died by taking his own life, but the autopsy leads to a more shocking and tragic conclusion.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Two members of a Texas separatist group flee following a hostage standoff.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: Lane Slettvet kills a drug dealer, then tries to stay under the radar.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: A witness to a murder flees and spends decades living under a fake name.

programme.title: Roadkill
programme.desc: Finnegan and Newbern give new life to a '57 Chevy Bel Air that was pulled from a junkyard after more than 30 years. The guys drop in a small-block V8 and turbo 350 to get the car back on the pavement for a bumpy road trip back to where it came from.

programme.title: Roadkill Garage
programme.desc: Dulcich enlists Wiley Stevens and Chris Birdsong to transplant a third-generation Hemi into the 1974 Dodge D100, also known as the Mopar Muscle Truck; after issues hold up progress, the guys clean up a new project 1974 Dodge Charger.

programme.title: Faster With Finnegan
programme.desc: The guys put John Andrade Jr. in a tiny truck and beat him in a mud drag race with the Dirt Track Camaro; Andrade challenges them to see what they can do with a derelict and parted-out Mustang against his 79 Chevy Malibu.

programme.title: Mecum Full Throttle
programme.desc: Mecum Full Throttle offers highlights from the Kissimmee 2023 auction; joining Scott Hoke, John Kraman, Bill Stephens, Stephen Cox, Chris Jacobs and Katie Osborne as they call the auction action.

programme.desc: Featuring highlights from the Glendale 2023 auction; Scott Hoke, John Kraman, Bill Stephens, Stephen Cox, Chris Jacobs and Katie Osborne call the action from State Farm Stadium.

programme.desc: A woman (Alexandra Paul) returns to her hometown to uncover the truth behind her wrongful conviction for a crime 25 years earlier.

programme.title: Devil's Diary

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A high school history teacher is involved in a sex scandal with one of her students; a woman's whirlwind romance with a Cuban spy.

programme.title: Deadly Influencer
programme.desc: A young woman commits murder to keep her classmates' social media careers under her thumb. After killing a popular friend, she turns her sights on a new girl, but the girl's mother suspects the truth and will fight to protect her daughter.

programme.title: Deadly Debutante
programme.desc: A sinister young woman will do whatever it takes to be chosen Belle of the Ball at an annual debutante ball.

programme.title: Deadly Match
programme.desc: Trina goes live with her unique dating website and it becomes a huge success until she shuts it down to stop a prostitution hub. When one of the users from the site turns up dead, Trina looks to her now-defunct site for clues to solve the crime.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: In 2007, Drew Peterson was charged for murdering Kathleen, his third wife; new interviews with Drew's girlfriend, Nicole Speakman.

programme.desc: A young woman commits murder to keep her classmates' social media careers under her thumb. After killing a popular friend, she turns her sights on a new girl, but the girl's mother suspects the truth and will fight to protect her daughter.
